tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe wypowiedzi (1.1.–1.6.), wybierając spośród podanych możliwości. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.prompt: The invitation to the royal ceremony came completely out of the _______. We hadn't expected it at all.
He was so angry that he was seeing _______ after his bike was stolen.
She's new to the job and still a bit _______. She'll improve with experience.
The company was finally in the _______ after years of financial losses.
He was caught _______ -handed stealing cookies from the jar.
Every family has a _______ sheep — someone who doesn't quite fit in.
